text:
Artifacts in Claude Code are now also available on Pro and Max plans.

Ask for an artifact, Claude writes the code, publishes it live to claude.a‍i, and updates it in real time while it keeps working. Pages are private to your account and fully self-contained. https://t.co/0xbJnaXx99 https://t.co/FwbNZlSNXW
